reason: Project-wide quality checklist for final review
Verify simulation, presentation, data, and dev boundaries remain intact
Verify strict TypeScript, exhaustive unions, and sun invariant handling
Verify replay/determinism gates cover all new M3 behavior
Verify fail-fast data validation and no render hot-path performance regressions
Engine-layer quality checklist for deterministic simulation
Verify shared sun drift and mirror-sync invariants
Verify new element behaviors match the MVP contract and ice behavior is preserved
Verify edited segment data remains replay-covered and readonly
Verify every segment and branch has valid solution paths
Verify no per-frame shadowBlur or avoidable glow allocation
Verify debug/HUD behavior reads state only and reflects live sun/drift
Check implementation against the M3-specific baseline and known M2 interfaces
